mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE following_mno = #{mno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_mno = #{mno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_mno = #{follower} AND following_mno = #{following}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO follows (follower_mno, following_mno) VALUES (#{follower}, #{following})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_mno = #{follower} AND following_mno = #{following}
mapper.select: SELECT m.* FROM follows f JOIN members m ON m.mno = f.follower_mno WHERE f.following_mno = #{mno} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT m.* FROM follows f JOIN members m ON m.mno = f.following_mno WHERE f.follower_mno = #{mno} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
